---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the research pipeline
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? (e.g., "Currently we cannot analyze intra-day sentiment effects because...")

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Approaches

What alternatives have you considered?

## Affected Components

- [ ] Ingestion
- [ ] Validation
- [ ] Preprocessing / Cleaning
- [ ] Feature Engineering
- [ ] EDA
- [ ] Statistical Analysis
- [ ] Machine Learning
- [ ] Reporting
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Impact

- [ ] New analysis capability
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Reproducibility / correctness fix
- [ ] Developer experience

## Additional Context

Add any references, links, or screenshots.
